---
id: getdocumentsbyfacets
title: "Read documents by facets"
description: "Read the documents including metadata (does not include enhanced metadata via `/documentmetadata`) macthing the given facet conditions."

hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

custom_edit_url: null
---

  method={"post"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/getdocumentsbyfacets"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

:::info beta

This endpoint is in Beta. Expect changes and instability.

:::

Read the documents including metadata (does not include enhanced metadata via `/documentmetadata`) macthing the given facet conditions.
